reason: Verify architecture and document-style commit compliance.
Verify stop_runtime_instance command shape and sidecar boundary are documented.
Verify Rust-owned lifecycle and structured diagnostics.
Verify runtime/recovery transitions are explicit and LocalPortOverride boundaries remain intact.
Verify OpenSSH observe/stop process behavior and diagnostics.
Verify runtime and recovery persistence contracts.
Verify Swift only calls bridge and renders returned snapshots.
Verify run/recovery stop/recover actions remain explicit and native.
Verify provider scope does not drift into unsupported Tailscale lifecycle.
Verify temporary overrides remain non-persistent to configuration.
Verify acceptance criteria and out-of-scope boundaries.
